channel.title: supermodel-api-docs Architecture Docs
channel.description: Architecture documentation for the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Explore files, functions, classes, domains, and dependencies.

item.title: ApiIntegration Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture
item.description: Manages the ingestion and rendering of the OpenAPI specification to provide interactive API endpoints and sandboxes. Architectural overview of the ApiIntegration domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: DocumentationCore Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture
item.description: The central engine handling page navigation, metadata management, and document structure definition. Architectural overview of the DocumentationCore domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: StylingSystem Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture
item.description: The presentation layer that controls the visual consistency of the documentation site. Architectural overview of the StylingSystem domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: docs.json — supermodel-api-docs Source File
item.description: Architecture documentation for docs.json, a json file in the supermodel-api-docs codebase.

item.title: overrides.css — supermodel-api-docs Source File
